---
title: "R code for example in Chapter X: <br>Title"
author: 
#output: html_document
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float: 
      collapsed: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

***

# New methods on this page

These are the core commands that produce the new methods described in Chapter X. The variable names are plucked from the examples further below.

<ul>
<li> *Calculating binomial probabilities*
```{r eval = FALSE}
    rcode here
```
</ul>

<li><ul> *Other new methods*

    <li>Sampling distribution of a proportion by repeated sampling from a known population.
    </ul>
</ul>   
***


<br>

# Table, Figure or topic name

<br>
